## Summary
- What changed, and why (1–5 bullets).

## Related issue
- Closes #

## Screenshots
- **Before**:
- **After**:
- (Optional) mobile before/after:

## Files changed
- List key files/components and why they were touched.

## Validation
Commands run (paste output or note “pass”):
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Guardrails checklist (required)
- [ ] **No direct pushes to `main`** (feature branch + PR only)
- [ ] Scoped to the linked issue (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] No changes to **auth / NextAuth** unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] No changes to **database schema / Prisma migrations** unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] No changes to **env / deployment settings** unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] No changes to **payment logic** unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] No routing changes unless explicitly authorized
- [ ] Focus/hover/active states verified
- [ ] Mobile + desktop sanity check completed

## AI assistance used
- **ChatGPT**: (what it helped with: architecture, prompt, review notes)
- **Cursor**: (what it implemented / refactored)
- **Gemini**: (review/QA feedback, regressions found)

## Risks remaining / follow-ups
- What might still be risky, and what to watch post-merge.
- Any known edge cases or TODOs.

## Merge recommendation
Choose one:
- [ ] Merge when checks pass and screenshots approved
- [ ] Needs follow-up fixes before merge
- [ ] Do not merge (explain)
